title: DIAGNOSE output — defect localization verdict for bugfix class

defect_report_ref.description: path to the defect report or CR file

baseline_refs.description: paths to frozen baseline artifacts read during localization

additionalProperties.description: path to a frozen baseline artifact

locks_verified.description: true if all referenced lock files were verified before diagnosis

items.description: one ordered step to reproduce the defect

repro_steps.description: ordered steps to trip the defect

expected_behavior.description: what correct behavior looks like per AC/oracle

expected_behavior_source.description: reference to the AC or oracle entry defining expected behavior

trace.description: static-trace path from entry point to failure site

confirmed.description: true if reproduction confirmed the defect

note.description: additional context about reproduction method or environment

localization.description: defect localized to a specific component, module, symbol, and site

component.description: component id C* containing the defect

module.description: source file path of the defect

site.description: exact code site; verbatim line or expression causing the defect

surface.description: scope of the blast radius; usually single method or function

root_cause.description: root cause analysis: cause, mechanism, and symptom vs cause distinction

cause.description: precise root cause statement; references module, symbol, and failing invariant

mechanism.description: how the cause produces the observed symptom; the failure chain

symptom_vs_cause.description: one line distinguishing symptom from root cause

verdict.description: defect-localized if cause found; cannot-localize if insufficient evidence

classification.description: defect classification: my-code | dependency | environment | etc.

regression_surface.description: ACs and oracle suites that must stay green after repair

items.description: AC id that must stay green

baseline_ac_must_stay_green.description: baseline AC ids on the touched surface that must stay green

oracle_suites.description: oracle suite paths scoped to the blast radius

note.description: scoping note: why these ACs and suites, not the whole inherited suite

repair_behavior_gap.description: optional: unresolved behavior question the repair raises; GAP-DETECT hunts it

underspecified.description: true if correct replacement behavior is not specified in the baseline

owner.description: which role resolves this; typically GAP-DETECT

note.description: additional context about the behavior gap

frozen_inputs_reread.description: count of frozen input artifacts re-read during diagnosis

localized_to_single_surface.description: true if defect localized to exactly one surface
